summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Boccaccio Restaurant website. All major features are working perfectly including hero section, navigation, language switching, menu categories, gallery, contact section, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section displays correctly with 'BOCCACCIO' title and 'REŠTAURÁCIA' subtitle
Navigation menu with smooth scroll to all sections (About, Menu, Gallery, Contact)
Language switcher functionality working for all 4 languages (SK, EN, DE, IT)
Menu section with 5 categories (steaks, seafood, salads, sides, desserts) and category switching
Menu items display with images, names, prices (€), and allergen badges
Gallery section with masonry grid layout displaying 6 restaurant images
Contact section with Google Maps iframe, address, phone, email, opening hours
Social media links (Instagram, Facebook) with correct URLs
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu that opens/closes correctly
Footer with copyright information (© 2026 Boccaccio. Všetky práva vyhradené)
Hover effects on menu cards and gallery images
Warm Italian color scheme (terracotta, olive, cream) implemented correctly
Professional typography with Cormorant Garamond and Manrope fonts
Smooth animations using Framer Motion and Lenis smooth scroll
